option.name: originalContent
option.value:
version: 0.2
phases: install: runtime-versions: java: corretto17 commands: - echo "Preparing Gradle wrapper..." - chmod +x gradlew
build: commands: - echo "Building executable JAR..." - ./gradlew clean bootJar --no-daemon - echo "Listing generated artifacts..." - ls -la build/libs/
artifacts: files: - build/libs/*.jar discard-paths: yes
cache: paths: - '/root/.gradle/**/*'

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
version: 0.2
phases: install: runtime-versions: java: corretto17 commands: - echo "Preparing Gradle wrapper..." - chmod +x gradlew
build: commands: - echo "Building executable JAR..." - ./gradlew clean bootJar --no-daemon - echo "Listing generated artifacts..." - ls -la build/libs/ - echo "Preparing artifacts for Elastic Beanstalk..." - mkdir -p output - cp build/libs/*.jar output/ - cp Procfile output/ - cp -r .ebextensions output/
artifacts: files: - '**/*' base-directory: output
cache: paths: - '/root/.gradle/**/*'
